General.Name: Diagnostic Medical Systems SA
General.Description: Diagnostic Medical Systems S.A. engages in the design, development, manufacture, and sale of medical imaging systems in France. It offers ADAM, in-house software suite; R and F solutions; bone densitometry; chest and bone room; mobile; c-arm; retrofit kit; and mammography equipment. The company was founded in 1979 and is headquartered in Gallargues-le-Montueux, France.
General.Address: 9 Avenue du Canal Philippe Lamour, Gallargues-le-Montueux, France, 30 660
